items.title: [正面] Genuinely my favorite gacha I have right now. The ...
items.summary: Genuinely my favorite gacha I have right now. The devs are open with the community about their plans and the gameplay is so in depths and the characters are all so diverse and fun. If you like slay the spire, please give it a try, especially since their is a collab (on morimens side, not sts side though) coming soon of it

items.summary: 玩到目前感觉还好，不过和想象中不太一样，战斗部分很少大部分都是剧情，就当文游打了，抽卡爆率挺高的，50抽有五个SSR了，还没有遇到评论说的卡关，继续玩着看吧
